content.query:
drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t
	(
	 [labclaimresultuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [claimstatuscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [provideruid] nvarchar(50),
	 [providernpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [servicedate] nvarchar(50),
	 [hcpcscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [loinccode] nvarchar(50),
	 [posnegresultindicator] bit,
	 [unitname] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

drop TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t;

CREATE TABLE customer.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t
	(
	 [labclaimresultuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [claimstatuscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [memberuid] nvarchar(50),
	 [provideruid] nvarchar(50),
	 [providernpi] nvarchar(50),
	 [servicedate] nvarchar(50),
	 [hcpcscode] nvarchar(50),
	 [loinccode] nvarchar(50),
	 [posnegresultindicator] bit,
	 [unitname] nvarchar(50),
	 [createddate] nvarchar(50)
	)
WITH
	(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	 CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
	 -- HEAP
	)
GO

--Uncomment the 4 lines below to create a stored procedure for data pipeline orchestration​
--CREATE PROC bulk_load_stg_ino_control_labclaim_t
--AS
--BEGIN
COPY INTO customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t
(labclaimresultuid 1, claimstatuscode 2, memberuid 3, provideruid 4, providernpi 5, servicedate 6, hcpcscode 7, loinccode 8, posnegresultindicator 9, unitname 10, createddate 11)
FROM 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/21537399/Inovalon/Inbound/control_consolidated_labclaim_combined.txt'
WITH
(
	FILE_TYPE = 'CSV'
	,MAXERRORS = 0
	,FIELDTERMINATOR = '|'
	,FIRSTROW = 1
	,ERRORFILE = 'https://deidstrgeaccdevelopment.dfs.core.windows.net/lexisnexis/'
)
--END
GO

SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_treatment_labclaim_t
GO
--28771756

SELECT count(*) FROM customer.stg_ino_control_labclaim_t
GO
--85751917
